column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="offering a cup of warm tea" | TEXT="お疲れ様です" P2: ACTION/PROPS="putting a hand on her cheek gently" | TEXT="ご無理なさらず" P3: ACTION/PROPS="smiling softly with a comforting gaze" | TEXT="お体にお気をつけて" P4: ACTION/PROPS="handing a warm towel" | TEXT="ゆっくり休んでください" P5: ACTION/PROPS="looking concerned but encouraging" | TEXT="いつでも頼ってください" P6: ACTION/PROPS="nodding warmly" | TEXT="頑張りましたね" P7: ACTION/PROPS="looking at the moon together" | TEXT="一息入れましょう" P8: ACTION/PROPS="walking side by side" | TEXT="無理は禁物ですよ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="patting her chest" | TEXT="安心してください"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="adjusting someone's collar gently" | TEXT="冷えますよ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="holding a fan near someone's face" | TEXT="少し涼みましょう" P3: ACTION/PROPS="offering a sweet treat" | TEXT="元気がでますように" P4: ACTION/PROPS="poking head out of a door" | TEXT="手伝いましょうか" P5: ACTION/PROPS="listening intently with a soft smile" | TEXT="お話し伺いますよ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="waving a hand gently" | TEXT="のんびりいきましょう" P7: ACTION/PROPS="looking up at the autumn leaves" | TEXT="気分転換しましょう" P8: ACTION/PROPS="holding a small lamp" | TEXT="足元にお気をつけて" P9: ACTION/PROPS="giving a thumbs up elegantly" | TEXT="きっと大丈夫です"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="sweeping the garden with a broom" | TEXT="清々しいですね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="pouring tea from a pot" | TEXT="おかわりはいかが" P3: ACTION/PROPS="wrapping a scarf around someone" | TEXT="暖かくしてください" P4: ACTION/PROPS="shaking hands gently" | TEXT="離れていても想っています" P5: ACTION/PROPS="giving a small nod of encouragement" | TEXT="いい調子です" P6: ACTION/PROPS="looking at a blooming peach tree" | TEXT="春はもうすぐですね" P7: ACTION/PROPS="standing by a stream" | TEXT="心が洗われますね" P8: ACTION/PROPS="putting a hand on someone's shoulder" | TEXT="そばにいますよ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="smiling from behind a paper screen" | TEXT="応援しています"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="blowing a kiss elegantly" | TEXT="元気を出して" P2: ACTION/PROPS="holding a small rabbit" | TEXT="癒やされますね" P3: ACTION/PROPS="looking through a telescope" | TEXT="広い心で" P4: ACTION/PROPS="making a heart shape with fingers" | TEXT="感謝しています" P5: ACTION/PROPS="clapping hands softly" | TEXT="お見事でした" P6: ACTION/PROPS="giving a flower to someone" | TEXT="あなたに似合います" P7: ACTION/PROPS="walking in the snow with a red umbrella" | TEXT="凍えないように" P8: ACTION/PROPS="sitting by a waterfall" | TEXT="リラックスしましょう" P9: ACTION/PROPS="looking up at the cherry blossoms" | TEXT="美しいですね"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="reading a book calmly" | TEXT="落ち着きますね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="making tea with focus" | TEXT="心を込めて" P3: ACTION/PROPS="looking at an old photo" | TEXT="懐かしい思い出ですね" P4: ACTION/PROPS="brushing long black hair" | TEXT="明日は良い日に" P5: ACTION/PROPS="meditating in a temple" | TEXT="静かに見守ります" P6: ACTION/PROPS="carrying a heavy basket together" | TEXT="半分持ちますね" P7: ACTION/PROPS="blowing on hot steam from tea" | TEXT="火傷しないで" P8: ACTION/PROPS="holding a small bird" | TEXT="守りたくなりますね" P9: ACTION/PROPS="looking directly into eyes" | TEXT="信じています"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="pointing at a rainbow" | TEXT="希望がありますね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="lighting an incense stick" | TEXT="安らいでください" P3: ACTION/PROPS="walking down a stone path" | TEXT="焦らず一歩ずつ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="sitting on a porch" | TEXT="月が良いですね" P5: ACTION/PROPS="looking at a firefly" | TEXT="儚くも美しいですね" P6: ACTION/PROPS="wrapping a gift" | TEXT="喜んでくれるかな" P7: ACTION/PROPS="shading her eyes from the sun" | TEXT="日差しが強いですね" P8: ACTION/PROPS="smiling with a wink" | TEXT="無理しすぎないで" P9: ACTION/PROPS="clasping her hands together" | TEXT="お祈りしています"
